mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (user_id, student_number, class_name, major, counselor_id, enrollment_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{studentNumber}, #{className}, #{major}, #{counselorId}, #{enrollmentDate})
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, u.real_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id ORDER BY s.student_number

SELECT s.*, u.real_name, u2.real_name as counselor_name, CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'NONE' END as housing_status FROM student s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON s.counselor_id = u2.id LEFT JOIN assignment a ON s.id = a.student_id AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY s.student_number LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student s
AND s.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{className}, '%')
AND s.major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
AND s.counselor_id = #{counselorId}

SELECT s.*, u.real_name, u2.real_name as counselor_name, CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'NONE' END as housing_status FROM student s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON s.counselor_id = u2.id LEFT JOIN assignment a ON s.id = a.student_id AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE s.id = #{id}
